blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,132 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
